title: Zygogynum schlechteri
intro: There is insufficient information available about the plant Zygogynum schlechteri.
taxonomy: Zygogynum schlechteri is a species of flowering plant in the family Winteraceae. It is native to New Caledonia, a country in the Pacific Ocean. The classification of Zygogynum schlechteri places it within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This plant is further categorized into the class Magnoliopsida and the order Canellales. The classification of Zygogynum schlechteri is a part of its broader taxonomic classification in the botanical nomenclature.
